description: You are a Junior Support Engineer. Process a technical issue report found in the inbox containing keywords such as 'error', 'bug', 'fail', or 'problem'. Forward the email to 'tickets@localhost' with the subject line prefixed by '[TICKET] ' and the metadata lines 'Priority: Normal' and 'Tags: triage, bug' prepended to the message body. Move the original email into a new folder named 'Processed-Tickets'.
